use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATMENT TO ALLEVIATE INFLAMMATION OF THE EYE
TREATMENT OF POSTOPERATIVE INFLAMMATION AND REDUCTION OF OCULAR PAIN IN PATIENTS WHO HAVE UNDERGONE CATARACT SURGERY
